name: Mushroom, Anchovy & Rosemary Focaccia
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Fresh shredded mozzarella or provolone cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a medium skillet.
2. Cut the mushroom into 1/4-inch-thick slices.
3. Saute the mushroom slices in hot oil until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
4. Place the sauted mushrooms on the focaccia or pizza crust.
5. Arrange the anchovy strips on top of the mushrooms.
6. Sprinkle with rosemary and cheese.
7. Place the dish on a baking sheet.
8. Bake at 400 degrees until the cheese melts and the bread is hot, 6 to 10 minutes.
9. Serve hot.
